positive: A stylized and geometric illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunset. The mountains should be composed of clean, abstract, overlapping shapes in deep indigo, burnt orange, and dusty rose tones. Include a crescent moon and several stylized, sharp pine trees rendered as simple, strong silhouettes against the bright sky. Use bold, graphic linework and a highly contrasted color palette reminiscent of screen printing or woodblock prints. Minimalist composition with a central focal point, designed for excellent visibility when printed on fabric. Vector art style, flat graphic design, symmetrical composition, dramatic lighting, highly defined edges, perfect print quality.
